name: NavigatorTreeCommands
summary: Graphisoft official 'Navigator Tree Commands' command group — 14 JSON-RPC commands (Archicad 28.0).

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: GetBuiltInContainerNavigatorItems
methods.summary: Returns the details of the built-in container navigator items identified by their Ids.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: navigatorItems.

methods.name: GetDetailNavigatorItems
methods.summary: Returns the details of the detail navigator items identified by their Ids.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: navigatorItems.

methods.name: GetDocument3DNavigatorItems
methods.summary: Returns the details of the 3D document navigator items identified by their Ids.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: navigatorItems.

methods.name: GetElevationNavigatorItems
methods.summary: Returns the detailed elevation navigator items identified by their Ids.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: navigatorItems.

methods.name: GetInteriorElevationNavigatorItems
methods.summary: Returns the details of the interior elevation navigator items identified by their Ids.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: navigatorItems.

methods.name: GetNavigatorItemTree
methods.summary: Returns the tree of navigator items.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: navigatorTree.

methods.name: GetNavigatorItemsType
methods.summary: Returns all navigator item types based on the navigator item identifiers given. An error is returned for each identifier that is not found.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: navigatorItemIdAndTypeList.

methods.name: GetPublisherSetNames
methods.summary: Returns the names of available publisher sets.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: publisherSetNames.

methods.name: GetSectionNavigatorItems
methods.summary: Returns the details of the section navigator items identified by their Ids.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: navigatorItems.

methods.name: GetStoryNavigatorItems
methods.summary: Returns the details of the story navigator items identified by their Ids.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: navigatorItems.

methods.name: GetWorksheetNavigatorItems
methods.summary: Returns the details of the worksheet navigator items identified by their Ids.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: navigatorItems.

methods.name: MoveNavigatorItem
methods.signature: MoveNavigatorItem(navigatorItemIdToMove: NavigatorItemId, parentNavigatorItemId: NavigatorItemId, previousNavigatorItemId?: NavigatorItemId): object
methods.summary: Moves the given navigator item under the parentNavigatorItemId in the navigator tree. If previousNavigatorItemId is not given then inserts it at the first place under the new parent. If it is given then inserts it after this navigator item.

methods.name: RenameNavigatorItem
methods.summary: Renames an existing navigator item by specifying either the name or the ID, or both.
